item.title: Ode with Anthropic 内部，这家初创公司押注人工智能服务是企业的未来
item.summary: Can a handful of engineers really do the work of an army of consultants? That’s the bet behind Ode with Anthropic — the joint venture dedicated to embedding forward-deployed engineers in enterprise firms, backed by Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, Goldman Sachs and others.&#1
